response.original_title: Does SafePal Charge a Fee?[HelP De$K]
response.overview: SafePal  1 ➤ 888 ➤ 633 ➤ 4176  is a non-custodial crypto wallet, which means it does not hold your funds or control your private keys. Because of this structure, SafePal  1 ➤ 888 ➤ 633 ➤ 4176  does not charge users for storing, receiving, or simply holding cryptocurrency inside the wallet. You can create a wallet, store multiple assets, and manage your portfolio without paying any subscription or maintenance fee. This is one of the main reasons SafePal  1 ➤ 888 ➤ 633 ➤ 4176  is popular among crypto users who want full control over their digital assets without ongoing platform charges.
